CREATE TABLE test_set (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id FROM test_set WHERE value IN ('apple', 'banana');
SELECT id FROM test_set WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM test_set WHERE id > 2);
SELECT id FROM test_set WHERE value IN ('peach', 'banana', 'orange', 'cherry');
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT t1.id FROM test_set AS t1 JOIN another_table AS t2 ON t1.value IN ('apple', 'peach', 'kiwi') WHERE t2.value IN (SELECT value FROM another_table WHERE id IN (1, 2));
SELECT id FROM test_set WHERE value IN (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM another_table);
SELECT id FROM test_set WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM another_table WHERE value LIKE 'ki%');
SELECT id FROM (SELECT id FROM test_set WHERE value IN ('banana', 'grape')) AS subquery WHERE id > 1;
